name: Micromobility Lots
note: Generated by scripts/fetch_lime_parking.py from Lime partner GBFS (free_bike_status, Grand Rapids). Points are grid-cluster centroids of available scooters and e-bikes—useful as approximate parking activity, not as legal corral geometry. Designated zones appear in the Lime app. Clustered points within 1.75 mi of downtown (42.96333, -85.66806). Grid≈0.003°, min 4 vehicles per cell. https://www.li.me/gbfs-terms
